subject: transition to research group - an update

emails.subject: Transition to Research Group - An Update
emails.subject_base: Transition to Research Group - An Update
emails.body: Molly, This is an update on Anshuman. Please, see below. It seems that his transfer is not an issue for the time being. We can put it on a back-burner till he gets here. Vince P.S. The relevant section. I also spoke about Anshuman, and there was resistance to his leaing for such a long time. However, I have agreement from folks here to send him to Houston for a shorter stint on DPC budget. I will try to finalize that before I leave. I will call you in the evening to just chat. Forwarded by Vince J Kaminski/HOU/ECT on 01/19/2001 09:45 AM Sandeep Kohli@ENRON_DEVELOPMENT 01/19/2001 04:32 AM

emails.subject: Re: Transition to Research Group - An Update
emails.subject_base: Transition to Research Group - An Update
emails.body: Molly, Let's get L1 for Anshuman, just in case. I am sure he will stay here for a while once he comes. It is quite obvious Jeff Shankman will have to keep him longer, given the priority of the project. I assume there are no problems with Sandeep. Thanks. Vince Enron North America Corp. From: Molly Magee 01/19/2001 09:54 AM

emails.subject: Re: Transition to Research Group - An Update

emails.subject: Re: Transition to Research Group - An Update
emails.subject_base: Transition to Research Group - An Update
emails.body: Molly, I shall ask Sandeep to do it when he comes back from India next week. I have just learned that Anshuman has B1 visa and he can start on a project as a person delegated by Dhabol Power Company to Houston. To be absolutely above the line, I would still arrange the L1 visa. Vince Enron North America Corp. From: Molly Magee 01/19/2001 10:44 AM

emails.body: Molly, Thanks. Let's wait for Sandeep: he comes back Wednesday. Anshuman will work with him. Vince Enron North America Corp. From: Molly Magee 01/19/2001 06:08 PM
